summary: Sprint 1 ThookAI full stack testing completed. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend landing page, auth flow, dashboard, sidebar navigation, protected routes, and logout all working correctly.

issues: Credits bar shows '100 of 200 free credits' but registered users get 100 credits (200 may be incorrect max shown in sidebar)

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: CORSMiddleware is added AFTER include_router - middleware should be added before routes for proper request handling in FastAPI. However currently working since add_middleware is applied globally.
auth_utils.py: get_current_user imports db inside function to avoid circular imports - acceptable but could be refactored.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed user via register endpoint during testing (auto-cleanup not performed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 1 fully tested. All auth endpoints working. Landing page, /auth, /dashboard all verified. 9 sidebar nav items confirmed. Non-implemented routes show ComingSoon. Logout works. Protected routes redirect to /auth. Test user: test@thook.ai / TestPass123!
verified_features: POST /api/auth/register creates user, returns JWT token
POST /api/auth/login authenticates user, returns JWT token
GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid Bearer token
Landing page loads with dark theme, hero headline 'Your Voice. Infinite Content.'
Landing page: Navbar, Features bento, AgentCouncil (15 agents), Pricing (3 plans)
/auth page: Sign In + Create Account tabs, Google OAuth button, email/password form
Protected route /dashboard redirects to /auth when unauthenticated
Dashboard home: greeting (Good morning, Test), stats cards (Credits 100, Posts Created 0, Platforms 0 of 3, Persona Score), Quick Create buttons, onboarding banner
Content Studio shows ComingSoon page with Sprint 5 label
